messages.description: Specifies the lower left corner of the viewport rectangle, in pixels. The initial value is (0,0).
Specifies the width and height of the viewport. Values for width and height must be greater than 0.

arguments.description: Specifies the lower left corner of the viewport rectangle, in pixels. The initial value is (0,0).
Specifies the width and height of the viewport. Values for width and height must be greater than 0.
